summary: Iteration 305: Structured Names, Settings Lock, Terms Page, Route Cleanup - All features tested and working. Backend: 16/16 tests passed (100%). Frontend: All UI components verified.
critical_code_review_comments: Settings Lock API correctly implements 15-minute session with bcrypt password verification
_greeting() and _first_name() helpers in canonical_email_engine.py properly extract first name for personalization
Checkout page sends both first_name/last_name and composed customer_name for backward compatibility
Group Deal checkout correctly uses structured name fields with data-testid attributes
Affiliate Apply form has proper first_name/last_name fields with validation
Terms of Service page has all 6 required sections with proper data-testid attributes
/register/affiliate correctly redirects to /partners/apply via React Router Navigate
seed_data_creation: Created test affiliate application and guest order during backend testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: All features from iteration 305 are working: 1) Structured name fields (first_name/last_name) in CheckoutPage, GroupDealCheckoutPage, AffiliateApplyPage, 2) Settings Lock API with 15-min sessions protecting Commercial/Sales/Affiliate/Payout tabs, 3) Terms of Service page at /terms with 6 sections, 4) /register/affiliate redirects to /partners/apply, 5) Email personalization via _greeting() helper.

details: CheckoutPage.jsx has first_name and last_name fields with data-testid
Payload sends both structured names and composed customer_name
Backend /api/guest/orders accepts first_name and last_name
GroupDealCheckoutPage.jsx has first_name and last_name fields
data-testid='input-first-name' and 'input-last-name' present
Personalized confirmation shows 'Hi {first_name}' on done page
AffiliateApplyPage.jsx has first_name and last_name fields
data-testid='apply-first-name' and 'apply-last-name' present
Backend /api/affiliate-applications accepts structured names
/register/affiliate redirects to /partners/apply
React Router Navigate component handles redirect
Affiliate Apply page content displayed after redirect
/terms route returns 200 with Terms of Service page
6 sections present: Affiliate, Promo Codes, Wallet, Group Deals, Payment, Ratings
data-testid='terms-page' and 'terms-section-{n}' attributes present
POST /api/admin/settings-lock/unlock with correct password returns ok=True
Response includes expires_at and minutes=15
Session stored in settings_unlock_sessions collection
POST /api/admin/settings-lock/unlock with wrong password returns 401
Error detail: 'Invalid password'
GET /api/admin/settings-lock/status?email=X returns unlocked status
Returns unlocked=True with expires_at when session active
Returns unlocked=False when no session or expired
POST /api/admin/settings-lock/lock re-locks settings
Returns ok=True, unlocked=False
Session deleted from database
SettingsLockGate component shows lock icon and password field when locked
Commercial, Sales, Affiliate, Payout tabs wrapped with SettingsLockGate
After unlock, shows 'Settings unlocked (X:XX remaining)' with Lock Now button
_greeting('John Doe') returns 'Hi John,'
_greeting('') returns 'Hello,'
Email templates use _greeting() for personalized salutations
GET /api/public/payment-info returns bank details
Used by Group Deal checkout for bank transfer instructions
